title: rubus × splendens
intro: Rubus × splendens, also known as the red raspberry leaf, is a perennial plant that is a hybrid of Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, astringent, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × splendens include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, regulate menstrual cycles, and provide relief from morning sickness during pregnancy. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
